text: Meeting deadlines is a crucial skill in both work and study. Effective time management helps you break large tasks into smaller steps and allocate enough time for each. Prioritization is also important; focus on urgent or high-impact tasks first rather than less critical ones. If a deadline seems impossible, practice scope management by asking what can be simplified or removed without harming the main goal. Finally, clear communication is key—if you're struggling, let your team or supervisor know early instead of waiting until the last moment. Planning ahead, staying flexible, and being honest about your progress will help you meet deadlines with less stress.
